pi_items.source: Synthetic data created in setup_task.sh (line 43): insert_patient function call with 'DUBOIS' as nom parameter
Synthetic data created in setup_task.sh (line 43): insert_patient function call with 'Marie' as prenom parameter
Synthetic data created in setup_task.sh (line 43): insert_patient function inserts '1958-06-12' as FchPat_Nee field
Calculated from DOB 1958-06-12 and task date 2026-03-08 (from CLAUDE.md context)
Synthetic data created in setup_task.sh (line 43): insert_patient function inserts 'F' as gender (FchPat_Sexe field)
task.json metadata field; verified as valid ICD-10 code via web search

Web search: ICD-10-CM code I10 officially defines 'Essential (primary) hypertension' - persistently high systemic arterial blood pressure without identifiable secondary cause. See https://www.icd10data.com/ICD10CM/Codes/I00-I99/I10-I1A/I10-/I10
task.json metadata field; verified as correct keyword for I10. French term 'Hypertension artérielle essentielle' is correct translation of 'Essential arterial hypertension'
task.json metadata field; confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 50) and export_result.sh (line 18)
task.json metadata field; confirmed throughout setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and setup_medintux.sh as the official demo database for MedinTux

install_medintux.sh (line 49-50) downloads medintux-2.16.012.exe (210.9 MB, SHA1: 417e0e4fe2bafb0c321c55fd6d3494e8a40d6ce3). Verified as real software available on SourceForge. See https://sourceforge.net/projects/medintux/

task_utils.sh defines get_patient_guid (line 189-193) and insert_patient (line 199-222) functions using real MedinTux schema. Confirmed via setup_medintux.sh (lines 283-339) which inserts test patients into both IndexNomPrenom (search index) and fchpat (patient details) tables

Patient DUBOIS Marie is created synthetically in setup_task.sh (line 43) via insert_patient function, which uses SQL INSERT statements into IndexNomPrenom and fchpat tables. Patient is generated fresh for each task run and does not exist in any public database.

privileged_info_summary: The link_diagnosis_to_patient task uses MedinTux 2.16.012, a real free open-source medical practice management system available on SourceForge. The patient DUBOIS Marie (born 1958-06-12, age 67, female) is synthetic test data created at runtime via SQL INSERT statements into the DrTuxTest database (IndexNomPrenom and fchpat tables). The target diagnosis code I10 is verified as the official ICD-10 code for 'Essential (primary) hypertension' / 'Hypertension artérielle essentielle'. The task requires linking this diagnosis to the patient's record in the DrTuxTest demo database and creating a text file at /home/ga/diagnosis_result.txt containing the patient name, diagnosis code (I10), and diagnosis label. All metadata values have been verified against official sources and task scripts.
